metadata.name: Check Status of a Bridge De-icing System

description: With freezing temperatures forecasted, an operator must ensure the heating elements on a critical bridge are operational.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Freezing Temperatures Expected' weather alert.
Run a remote diagnostic on the 'Central Bridge' de-icing system.
Review the diagnostic report, which confirms all heating elements are functional and ready.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the system is ready for the cold weather.
